headline: Overnight rain clears; 80°F heat arrives Friday
weather_notes: NWS Special Weather Statement active as of 2:17 AM today — check NWS SLC before outdoor work.
Tonight's 65-70% rain provides natural irrigation; skip Wednesday watering for all beds.
Wednesday clears to sunny 62°F — the week's cleanest window for outdoor tasks.
Thursday-Friday warm to 77-80°F, first real heat of the season; newly sown beds will dry out fast.

suggested_tasks.title: Check c1 bean moisture before Thursday heat
suggested_tasks.description: Beans sown May 3 need consistent soil moisture through germination; overnight rain covers Wednesday, but 77-80°F heat arriving Thursday will dry the bed before the 7-10 day germination window closes.
